# Hyperbrowser — Cloud Browser Platform for AI Agents
# https://www.hyperbrowser.ai | https://docs.hyperbrowser.ai

## Documentation Pages

- /docs/quickstart — START HERE: 4 steps — install, auth, scrape a page. One working example.
- /docs/sessions — Manual browser sessions: sessions.create(), connectOverCDP(session.wsEndpoint), sessions.stop()
- /docs/scraping — Scraping + extraction: scrape.startAndWait(), extract.startAndWait(), agents.browserUse.startAndWait()
- /docs/troubleshooting — Error catalog: leaked sessions, wrong endpoint, package names, OOM
- /docs/api-reference — Full SDK reference: all methods, params, types, return values

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install @hyperbrowser/sdk
export HYPERBROWSER_API_KEY=your-key
```

```typescript
import Hyperbrowser from "@hyperbrowser/sdk";

const client = new Hyperbrowser({
  apiKey: process.env.HYPERBROWSER_API_KEY,
});

const result = await client.scrape.startAndWait({
  url: "https://news.ycombinator.com",
});
console.log(result.data);
```

## Key Details

- Node.js SDK: `npm install @hyperbrowser/sdk`
- Python SDK: `pip install hyperbrowser`
- Auth: `HYPERBROWSER_API_KEY` environment variable
- Dashboard: https://app.hyperbrowser.ai
- Simple scraping: use `scrape.startAndWait()` (no session management needed)
- Manual sessions: always call `sessions.stop(session.id)` in finally block
- CDP endpoint: `session.wsEndpoint` (not `session.url` or `session.cdp_ws_url`)
- Session options: useStealth, useProxy, solveCaptchas, acceptCookies
